variants: Ivana Stevanovic currently resides in Clearwell Spinney, but her journey began in the picturesque Candlebark Vale where she was born. She proudly received the Meadowglass Medal, a recognition of her remarkable contributions to her field. Ivana is also the author of the Ridgeback Transmission Model, which has significantly impacted her profession. In addition to her professional pursuits, she is an active participant in the Whispergleam Calligraphers Union, where she cultivates her passion for calligraphy among fellow artists.
